headline: Botox in Chennai -- Natural-Looking Results
subheadline: Conservative, individualized dosing to soften expression lines while preserving natural movement.
metaDescription: Botox treatment in KK Nagar, Chennai from trained dermatologists. Natural-looking, conservative dosing. Book a consultation.

whyPatientsChoose.title: Conservative Dosing Philosophy
whyPatientsChoose.description: We favor starting conservatively, aiming to soften lines while preserving natural expression -- not a uniform, one-size dose.

whyPatientsChoose.title: Administered by Dermatologists
whyPatientsChoose.description: Every treatment is administered by a trained consultant dermatologist, not delegated staff.

educationalInsight.title: Why Botox Doesn't Have to Look 'Done'
educationalInsight.body: Looking overdone is almost always a function of dosing and technique, not the treatment itself. Our default approach favors conservative dosing that preserves natural facial movement.

steps: Facial assessment of muscle activity and expression lines
Discussion of your specific goals and areas of concern

doctorsPerspectiveStructured.patientConcern: I don't want to look frozen or obviously 'done.'
doctorsPerspectiveStructured.response: That's the default outcome we aim for too. We start conservatively and build from there based on how it actually looks on you -- not a fixed dose applied the same way for everyone.

processSteps.title: Consultation
processSteps.description: Facial assessment and discussion of which lines you'd like to address.

processSteps.title: Treatment
processSteps.description: Conservative, individualized dosing administered by a trained dermatologist.

processSteps.title: Follow-Up
processSteps.description: Results build over the following days; we're available if you want any adjustment discussed at a follow-up visit.

landingFaqs.question: How long does Botox last?
landingFaqs.answer: Effects typically build over the days following treatment and gradually fade over several months. Many patients maintain results with periodic sessions.

landingFaqs.question: Will it look natural?
landingFaqs.answer: We favor a conservative, natural-looking approach by default, aiming to soften lines while preserving your natural expression.

landingFaqs.question: Is there a minimum age?
landingFaqs.answer: There's no fixed age -- it depends on your specific expression lines and goals, discussed individually at consultation.
